Table of Contents

Interface EllipticArc

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

A portion of the boundary of a 2D ellipse that connects two points; optionally has measure, height and ID attributes at each endpoint.

[Guid("FA44C5F5-16C6-11D2-AA7A-00C04FA37BA4")]
public interface EllipticArc : IEllipticArc, ICurve, IGeometry
